## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Related issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New platform adapter
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `docs/`) where relevant
- [ ] No new dependencies added, or added dependency is justified in the PR
- [ ] No secrets, telemetry, or third-party trackers introduced

## Testing notes

How did you verify the change? Include manual test steps if relevant (e.g. which booking.com URL, which saved origin).

## Screenshots

If this changes UI, include before/after screenshots.
